reviews.review_description: I have several vets, docs and nurses doing the hard work now...fun little title..my son loves this game..you start off on your own caring for each animal in,then as you grow,employ staff to earn the money..fun little cheap title,it's worth a couple of quid easy..recommended

My daughter and I have began playing this game but either falling or just for no reason all a sudden, You can’t play the game the whole game is glitched. Then when you turn off or shut off whole system nothing seems to fix this issue. Been trying for almost a whole day. Please help other than this she loves the game.

developer_response.body:
We’re really sorry to hear that you’re experiencing this issue. If you could share a short video showing the problem, we’ll be able to resolve it as quickly as possible.

You can reach us at: totosstudios@gmail.com

reviews.review_description: Really impressed so far, yes there are glitches and issues, but it's an enjoyable game so far and my daughter absolutely loves it! I'm giving it 5 stars as I can see it's potential!

The gane overall turned out to be much more enjoyabke than I initially expected given it's very cheap and simple nature. It's definitely lacking as a VR game overall (lackluster presentation and mknimal soundscaoe outside of repetitive music, zero physics or real interactions) but was good for some easy mindless casual VR time with gaining money and building everything up having a nice addictive touch.
The only issues I had were -
1-  You always fall through the gane world if you step outside, mzking it necessary to clise and restart the game. Luckily it always saves so as to not lose any progress, but WHY even make it possible to step outside if  this is guaranteed to happen? Do the devs nit bither playtesting anything?...

2-  The final/ most expensive room addition is bugged all to h*ll.. It ONLY offers shots (green needles) for you and the nurses to use, but the animals coming into that room need EVERYTHING the game offers (from the pinj pad-looking item to the pills/ capsules). This makes the expensive nurses in this room useless as they cant run into the other rooms to get whats needed, leaving them just standing there 90% of the time. This makes thr room useless and one I ignored. 

3-  I upgraded and bought everything in the game in under 50 minutes... making it a very short lived title. It's not terrible given the price I guess, but a game built on grinding, building, and other more semi-addictive qualities should be so much bigger. I.e; more rooms, more animals, more upgrades, etc. etc...
It seems like this dev team just makes games quickly and cheaply to just drop them and move on to quickly throwing together another title. Hopefully I'm erong snd they keep building upon this title, but I've been disappointed a number of times with that type of hope from other dev teams already. 😅

So for the price, especially the sale price- it's a good little chill game. It won't last you buyt an hour, but still enjoyable enough for that hour.

developer_response.body:
First of all, thank you for playing our game and providing your feedback. Your comments are incredibly valuable to us. We’d like to address some of the points you raised:

Falling Out of the Game World:
We acknowledge this issue, and while it can be unavoidable at times, we're aware of it and will fix it in an upcoming update. Thankfully, the save feature ensures you won’t lose any progress.

Nurses and Room Design:
The limitations of the final room’s items were meant to encourage players to create different strategies. The nurses staying idle was a design choice to promote more strategic thinking. We plan to improve this based on your feedback.

Game Length and Content:
Yes, the game can be completed fairly quickly, but as a small indie team, our goal was to offer a fun, quick experience. We are planning to add more content and expand the game based on player feedback.

While it may have started as a small project, we’re committed to improving it and expanding it with your input. Thanks for your patience and understanding!

Thank you,
Your Development Team

reviews.review_description: Started out a nice game for grandkids,, but after about 10 minutes they went to the second room and its been unplayable sense..  Its all stripes and just a big glitchy mess.   We tried uninstalling and reinstalling but its still all messed to where we cant even get back to the first room.   Sad because the kidsliked what we were able to play.

developer_response.body: We apologize for the issue you're experiencing. We're glad to hear that you were enjoying the game. If possible, please send a video or a screenshot of the problem to totosstudios@gmail.com, and we will make sure to fix the issue as soon as possible. Thank you for your understanding!

reviews.review_description: My daughter and me like this kind of game, please add new areas to unlock 😎

I'm a fan of games like this. And this game is fun. Slight bugs: the clipboard is a bit too low. I have to look up then quickly look down to see the bottom of it. The last area isn't operating correctly. Every other bed isn't working so the nurses would end up just standing there holding the pets. This one could be done purposely, but there's only one kind of medicine on that side and you're getting every type of sick pet in that room. If that's done purposely then walking through the doors should be a lot easier. There's moments where I have to step back a few times to try to get through the doors. When you go out in the parking lot you fall.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed feedback! We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts. Rest assured, we’re already working on improvements in the areas you’ve mentioned. If you enjoy games like this, feel free to stay tuned and follow us for more updates. We wish you happy gaming!
www.totosgames.com

reviews.review_description: I love these style games on my phone, but with the amount of turning around and the back and forth quickly, it made me feel sick. The only other game that's made me feel this way in over a year was the Rollercoaster game. I gave it 3 stars because the game is enjoyable, but I personally couldn't handle it.

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your feedback. Motion sickness can indeed be a concern for many users on VR platforms. To address this, we will be adding a teleport movement feature to our game as soon as possible. If you have any other suggestions, please don't hesitate to reach out to us at totosstudios@gmail.com.

reviews.review_description: This game is perfect if you're looking to spend a relaxing evening. I used to play similar games on mobile, but playing it in VR is much more enjoyable. Thank you!
